Description: "Make the Scaffold background color adaptive in tool_detail_screen.dart to support dark mode correctly across all tools including Qibla Finder."
Instruction: "Change Scaffold's backgroundColor to adapt dynamically to dark theme using _isDark ? const Color(0xFF0A1220) : const Color(0xFFF3F8F5)."
ReplacementContent: "    return Scaffold(\n      backgroundColor: _isDark ? const Color(0xFF0A1220) : const Color(0xFFF3F8F5),"
